free_text: Charged particle evaporation from compound nuclei
formed by bombardment of 58Ni with 70 MeV 16O ions
The self-supporting target of metallic 58Ni was
prepared by vacuum evaporation onto a sugar coated
glass plate from which the target afterwards was
The target was prepared from isotope separated 58Ni
obtained as oxide and had an isotopic purity of > 98%.
The target thickness was approximately 150 ug/cm2.
